Download for free

Stick & Celly Contest

Enter the #StickCellyContest, a month-long Instagram contest with over $2,000 in prizes. Two New Winners Every Week in June.

Learn How to Enter
``

Best Celly Wins a $250 Prize Pack

Exclusive Coach Bowman Training Tank, Tripod, One Year Coach Bowman Subscription, and a $100 Amazon Giftcard.

Stick a Dismount, Hit a Celly.

Capture a stuck dismount followed by your favorite celebration using the Coach Bowman app. Want to stand out? Add your favorite skills before the dismount.

How to Enter the #StickCellyContest

1 Step 1 of 4

Start in the app

Download the Free Coach Bowman App

All submissions must be captured using the Coach Bowman app, and no payment is required to qualify for the contest.

2 Step 2 of 4

Film your clip

Capture Your Stick & Celly in the App

Use Coach Bowman to record a stuck dismount followed immediately by your favorite celebration. Best celly wins.

3 Step 3 of 4

Make it official

Include the Required Watermark

Use the #StickCellyContest button while clipping to add the required watermark and agree to the contest terms and conditions .

4 Step 4 of 4

Submit your entry

Post on Instagram, Tag @coach.bowman.app, and Hashtag #StickCellyContest

Share your clip as a Reel, tag us, and include the hashtag to complete your entry.

Step 1 of 4

Additional Information

Multiple Submissions

Participants may submit an unlimited number of unique entries up to the last drawing in June.

How Winners Are Picked

Best celly wins! We pick the most creative, funny, or unique entries. It is not about the hardest skill or highest score.

How We Will Contact Winners

Winners will be messaged on Instagram. Be sure to follow @coach.bowman.app and have your DMs open. Winners are expected to respond within 48 hours to claim their prizes, and provide a photo for the winner announcement posts. If a winner does not respond within 48 hours, an alternate winner will be selected.

Two New Winners in 0 Days
